title: Long Context Report Iteration And Compaction Recovery
goal: Stress long-running context with many intermediate outputs, trigger or simulate near-limit compaction, and verify old references still work after compaction.

rounds.prompt: 生成候选分析 A：围绕 BioAgent 引用交互可靠性做证据表和短报告。
生成候选分析 B：围绕 context window 压缩和 handoff slimming 做证据表和短报告。
acceptanceChecks: new artifacts do not overwrite A refs

rounds.prompt: 生成候选分析 C：围绕失败恢复和 artifact repair 做证据表、日志摘要和短报告。
acceptanceChecks: context meter updates if telemetry is available

rounds.prompt: ※1 将第一轮报告中这段话和当前结论对比，指出是否出现结论漂移。
※2 根据最新运行日志中的失败原因修复并继续，不要重跑无关报告。

referenceOps.source: latest failure reason in run log

rounds.prompt: 触发或模拟 context near-limit；确认 meter、compact event 和 audit refs 出现，然后继续。
※1 compact 后再次围绕旧引用追问：这个早期段落是否仍应保留在最终报告？

referenceOps.expectedHighlight: old report paragraph is highlighted after compaction

acceptanceChecks: backend can recover via refs rather than raw context

rounds.prompt: 输出压缩前后仍一致的最终结论、可复现 refs 和 compact 审计说明。
acceptanceChecks: final conclusion references pre/post compact evidence
audit refs and artifact refs are present

browser: screenshot of old chip highlighting source after compact
computerUse: click old reference chip after compact

blockerTemplate: If real context pressure cannot be reached, use UI telemetry simulation and record that backend compaction was not validated.
